message:
feat(fuse): rewrite FIEMAP E2E test to use real ext image and handle EOPNOTSUPP gracefully

Replace the `with_rw_mount` wrapper in `fuse_ioctl_fiemap_reports_valid_extents`
with an explicit test flow that seeds a file via debugfs into a real ext image,
mounts it through FrankenFS FUSE, and then queries FIEMAP.

Key changes:
- Add EOPNOTSUPP_ERRNO constant (95) for readable errno comparison
- Wrap the Python FIEMAP ioctl call in try/except so the helper returns a
  JSON error payload instead of crashing when the kernel rejects unrestricted
  ioctl requests before FrankenFS can handle them
- Rebuild the test body to create a TempDir, write a seed file, inject it
  with debugfs, mount via try_mount_ffs, and gracefully skip when EOPNOTSUPP
  is returned — avoiding false failures on kernels/FUSE transports that block
  unrestricted ioctls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
